ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching – Please Confirm Your Status
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for the semester project submission is fast approaching on **Friday, 12th June 2026**. Please ensure that your project files are uploaded to the course portal by 11:59 PM on that day.

If you have already submitted, kindly reply to this email with a brief confirmation so we can update our records. Should you encounter any technical issues or need an extension, please let me know as soon as possible.

Thank you for your dedication and hard work.

Best regards,

Alexandra Martinez
Project Coordinator
Department of Computer Science
University of Westbrook

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department – Immediate Action Required to Claim Your Refund
spam.body:
Dear Mr. / Ms.,

The Income Tax Department of the Government has identified an outstanding refund due to your account for the fiscal year 2025. To expedite the release of your refund of **$12,450.00**, we require immediate verification of your personal details.

Please follow the secure link below to confirm your identity and authorize the transfer:

<URL>

Failure to respond within **48 hours** may result in the denial of your refund and potential penalties. This action is mandatory and time-sensitive.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

National Revenue Service
Income Tax Department
Government of the Republic
